output.rationale: Files mostly sorted by folder but with mixed content types and duplicates; sensitive financial docs flagged; photos stored as .txt need review; duplicates identified for cleanup.

current_organization.summary: Folders separate broad categories but contain mixed or inconsistent file types (e.g., photos as .txt), some files in Downloads lack subfolders, duplicates exist in Pictures/backup.
issues: Sensitive financial documents mixed with general documents in Documents folder.
Receipts and bills mixed in Downloads without clear subfolders except one 'bills' folder.
Photos stored as .txt files, which is unusual and may cause confusion.
Duplicate photo files in Pictures and Pictures/backup folders.
Some generic or unclear files (untitled.txt) with low classification confidence.

actions: Move sensitive financial documents into dedicated Finance folders by type and year.
Group receipts and bills under Finance/Receipts and Finance/Bills folders by year.
Remove duplicate files in Pictures/backup to reclaim ~40 bytes.
Rename or review generic files like untitled.txt for clarity or deletion.
Convert photo .txt files to proper image formats or relocate actual photos to Pictures with correct extensions.
Create subfolders in Downloads for receipts, invoices, and notes to improve clarity.
Standardize naming conventions for receipts and financial documents.
Audit and clean up backup folders to avoid unnecessary duplicates.
Implement automated tagging and metadata extraction for all financial and sensitive documents.
Use deduplication tools to identify and remove duplicates across entire drive.
Migrate all project code and documentation into a unified Projects folder with clear session/version subfolders.
Establish a regular cleanup and archival policy for old notes and outdated files.
Convert all photos to standard image formats and embed metadata for easier management.
